h1.base: margin: 40px 0 20px; font-size: 2em; letter-spacing: 0.05em; line-height: 1.5; background: #e74c3c; color: #fff; padding: 15px 20px; border-radius: 4px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);

h2.base: margin: 30px 0 15px; font-size: 1.6em; letter-spacing: 0.02em; line-height: 1.5; border-bottom: 4px solid #e74c3c; padding-bottom: 8px;

h3.base: margin: 24px 0 10px; font-size: 1.3em; line-height: 1.5; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 6px solid #e74c3c;

styles.paragraph: line-height: 1.8; margin: 1em 0; font-size: 1em; color: #2c3e50; font-weight: 500; text-align: justify;

code.block: color: #e0e0e0; background: #2c3e50; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #1a252f; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 1em 1em 1em;  font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap;
code.inline: background: #fdedec; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; color: #c0392b; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #f5b7b1; font-weight: bold;

styles.quote: border-left: 6px solid #e74c3c; border-radius: 4px; padding: 15px; background: #fdfefe; margin: 1em 0; color: #641e16; font-style: italic; font-weight: 600;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1em auto; display: block; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
styles.link: color: #e74c3c; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid #e74c3c; font-weight: bold;

emphasis.strong: font-weight: 900; color: #e74c3c; background: rgba(231,76,60,0.15); padding: 0 4px; border-radius: 2px;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border: 2px solid #e74c3c; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden;
table.header: background: #e74c3c; font-weight: 900; color: #fff; padding: 10px; font-size: 1em; text-align: center;
table.cell: border: 1px solid #eee; padding: 10px; color: #2c3e50; font-size: 1em; font-weight: 500;

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 4px solid #e74c3c; margin: 30px 0; border-radius: 2px;

footnote.ref: color: #e74c3c; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: bold;
footnote.backref: color: #e74c3c; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9em; font-weight: bold;
